title: Eva suicides its hard to talk about
display_title: Eva suicides its hard to talk about
wikitext:
[]: Eva suicides... it's hard to talk about.             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Tue Dec 07, 2010 2:28 pm Does anybody know if there's ever been a case where Evangelion drove someone who was already depressed and mentally unwell over the edge and to suicide, or an attempt? It's a distasteful topic to be sure, and I'm not considering it myself. I just find myself... curious. A series as powerful as Eva must have pushed someone over the edge into the abyss. At some point. In time.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Dec 07, 2010 3:03 pm The closest thing that comes to mind is this story: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2003-12-02/evangelion-brings-man-to-kill-mother

[]:             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Tue Dec 07, 2010 3:20 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2003-12-02/evangelion-brings-man-to-kill-mother

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Dec 07, 2010 4:05 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The closest thing that comes to mind is this story: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2003-12-02/evangelion-brings-man-to-kill-mother

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Dec 07, 2010 4:18 pm Ah, homicide and pop-philosophy. It never gets old. Edit: And why don´t these people kill themselves first? I mean, if they didn´t exist anymore, nobody else would. Bullshit excuses, if you ask me.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Dec 07, 2010 5:09 pm The page wouldn't load for some reason. Summary, please? @TOPIC I highly doubt it has. I had actually been considering suicide before I watched Eva. That's what kept me from offing myself.

[]:             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Tue Dec 07, 2010 5:26 pm TehDonutKing wrote: The page wouldn't load for some reason. Summary, please? @TOPIC I highly doubt it has. I had actually been considering suicide before I watched Eva. That's what kept me from offing myself.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Dec 07, 2010 8:09 pm Yeah. I did.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Dec 07, 2010 8:43 pm I remember when I contemplated suicide at the age of fourteen . . . for about five minutes.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Tue Dec 07, 2010 10:01 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The closest thing that comes to mind is this story: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2003-12-02/evangelion-brings-man-to-kill-mother

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 07, 2010 11:41 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: That is messed up, but a a lawyer I can tell you

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Dec 07, 2010 11:58 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The closest thing that comes to mind is this story: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2003-12-02/evangelion-brings-man-to-kill-mother

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Wed Dec 08, 2010 12:52 am What makes it even darker is that kid was Japanese, and the Japanese are known for their very low crime rate and very high regard for their elders, in general. Every so often, though, someone takes their hobby a bit too far...

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Wed Dec 08, 2010 1:20 am Guyver Spawn wrote: This is the first time that I seen this news story before, sounds pretty crazy. I never seen a person kill someone from a anime. I seen people kill people from using ideas from music, movies, and video games but never anime. I'm gald that guy is in Jail until 2018.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Dec 08, 2010 2:30 am I seen worst, he is nowhere as bad as Tsutomu Miyazaki.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Dec 08, 2010 7:44 am Guyver Spawn wrote: I seen worst, he is nowhere as bad as Tsutomu Miyazaki.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Dec 08, 2010 8:05 am Nightweaver20xx wrote: What makes it even darker is that kid was Japanese

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Wed Dec 08, 2010 9:50 am Actually, I remember that coming from a pretty dark pit at that stage in my life I found EoTV somewhat... uplifting...

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Wed Dec 08, 2010 10:20 am You people are so weird. Eva is just fap material. Loli/shota eroge bringing people to the point of suicide? lolwat.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Dec 08, 2010 10:57 pm ^because sometimes said smut is just that bad Galaxy News Reidio wrote: You contemplated suicide before the age of 14? Damn.
